album.title: Pride on the Seas

og.title: Pride on the Seas Lyrics - Agust Islandia

album.notesHtml:
Pride on the Seas is a Pride-focused single in the 2025 catalog with full lyrics now published below.

Pride on the seas where the stars dance aboveEvery wave a heartbeat every soul in loveWe are on fire the freedom the lightSailing through forever in the rainbow nightAnd they say it's too short but it feels so right

Deck lights flashing the music's in commandCrowd swaying wild to the beat of the bandFirst Officer here with a mission so trueKeeping the Captain's nails stuck with glue sir

Hands to the sky feel the night igniteEvery laugh every cheer shining pure and brightFrom the bow to the stern we're a family tonightNothing in the world could match this sight

Pride on the seas where the stars dance aboveEvery wave a heartbeat every soul in loveWe are on fire the freedom the lightSailing through forever in the rainbow nightAnd they say it's too short but it feels so right

Whoa oh oh oh oh oh Pride on the seasWhoa oh oh oh oh oh Dancing so freeWhoa oh oh oh oh oh We are the lightWhoa oh oh oh oh oh All through the night

Waves keep dancing right along with our feetSalt on our skin and the night feels sweetThe sea is our stage and the stars our cueEvery heart's wide open beating strong together

Hands to the sky feel the night igniteEvery laugh every cheer shining pure and brightFrom the bow to the stern we're a family tonightNothing in the world could match this sight

Pride on the seas where the stars dance aboveEvery wave a heartbeat every soul in loveWe are on fire the freedom the lightSailing through forever in the rainbow nightAnd they say it's too short but it feels so right

Whoa oh oh oh oh oh Pride on the seasWhoa oh oh oh oh oh Dancing so freeWhoa oh oh oh oh oh We are the lightWhoa oh oh oh oh oh All through the night

One hour at sea and we're endless tonightEvery voice a flame every soul in flightHold on to this moment let it burn foreverWe are the tide we rise together

Pride on the seas where the stars dance aboveEvery wave a heartbeat every soul in loveWe are on fire the freedom the lightSailing through forever in the rainbow nightAnd they say it's too short but it feels so right

Rainbow lights fading as the night drifts awayStill hear the laughter it's here to stayWaves keep the rhythm our hearts keep the beatPride on the seas til we meet til we meet

Pride on the seas where the stars dance aboveEvery wave a heartbeat every soul in loveWe are on fire the freedom the lightSailing through forever in the rainbow nightAnd they say it's too short but it feels so right

Deck lights flashing the music's in commandCrowd swaying wild to the beat of the bandFirst Officer here with a mission so trueKeeping the Captain's nails stuck with glue sir

Hands to the sky feel the night igniteEvery laugh every cheer shining pure and brightFrom the bow to the stern we're a family tonightNothing in the world could match this sight

Pride on the seasWhere the stars dance above
